questions.text: What does a high TF-IDF score indicate for a given term in a document?
options: The term is highly frequent in the current document but rare across the general corpus.
The term is common in all documents.
The term has been normalized to zero.
questions.correct_answer: The term is highly frequent in the current document but rare across the general corpus.
questions.explanation: TF-IDF reaches its maximum when a term appears frequently in a single document (high TF) but is relatively unique in the rest of the corpus (high IDF).
